name: Atwell on Spring
address: 1260 Spring St (8787 Georgia Ave), Silver Spring, MD 20910
bathroomsNote: Unit count and bathroom configurations not confirmed from available sources; building has 375 units ranging from studios to 3BR plus townhouses.

notes.doorman: Multiple sources including ApartmentList and search results describe '24-hour concierge.' Bozzuto marketing materials and resident reviews reference around-the-clock concierge services. One reviewer named a concierge staff member by name and praised the team.
notes.address: The project is commonly described as '8787 Georgia Ave' (the block address) but the street address listed on leasing platforms is 1260 Spring St, Silver Spring, MD 20910.
notes.packageRoom: Package room exists with concierge accepting deliveries; at least one reviewer noted difficulty with the double-entrance/package room setup, so the feature exists but has had reported friction.
notes.petFriendly: ApartmentList explicitly lists dogs and cats as permitted. ApartmentSearch showed 'not allowed' but that site flagged the property as 'not in our system', so ApartmentList is the more reliable source.
notes.unitClimate: ApartmentList lists 'air conditioning' as an in-unit feature; Bozzuto positions units as full luxury with modern appliances. HVAC control per-unit (not building-controlled) is consistent with the luxury positioning and 2024 construction vintage but not explicitly confirmed from a lease document or resident statement.
notes.wellMaintained: ApartmentRatings.com summarized reviewer characterization as 'well-maintained, peaceful community with excellent management' with responsive maintenance staff. Building opened 2023-2024.
notes.rent: 2BR range $2,780-$4,296/mo per ApartmentList (current as of search date June 2026). 1BR+den ~$2,838/mo. Studios from ~$1,752/mo.
notes.photo: Official gallery is at atwellonspring.com/gallery and bozzuto.com gallery page; og:image could not be retrieved due to 403 blocks on both domains.
